query: 2020 Tokyo Olympics held in 2021 most recent Summer Games
answer: The 2020 Tokyo Olympics, officially the XXXII Olympiad, were held from July 23 to August 8, 2021, in Tokyo, Japan. The event was postponed from 2020 due to the COVID-19 pandemic. It was the most recent Summer Games.
